roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT REQ ATC FOR RE-REFERRAL FOR ELECTRONIC MONITORING FILED
DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURS PC1538,5 - FILED AT INSISTENCE
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION FOR A FIRST DISMISSAL DUE TOWITNESS UNAVAILABILITY IS GRANTED AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD,/X: NO STIPULATION TO RE-FILE TODAY,/EMTERM/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE BEYOND THE 10TH DAY IS GRANTED,/ORMS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF RELEASE THE COURT IMPOSES THE FOLLOWING TERMS:/WS/RX/WEAP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON03-10-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS READY FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING TODAY,/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL APPEARS VIA ZOOM AND INDICATES SHE IS READY FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING BUT UNAVAILABLE FOR MEDICAL REASONS,/X:THE COURT NOTES DEFENDANT'S 60TH DAY NO TIME WAIVER IS TODAY, AS SUCH, CASE IS DISMISSED BY THE COURT,/ /X:PARTIES STIPULATE TO IMMEDIATE RE-FILE AND ARRAIGNMENT ON ORIGINAL COMPAINT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:01-26-22/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/LD:01-11-22/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORALMOTION FOR CONTINUANCE DUE TO WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: CASE ON CALENDAR TODAYIN ERROR,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-21-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT AND MOTION TO DETAIN/DEF:APPEARED VIA ZOOM/TEXT:DEFT ENTNG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:10-22-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/DEF:NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS; REAMIN CONFINED WITH INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE; WARRANTLESS SEARCH/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM/TE:3 HOURS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/DEF:IS SICK/PD/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN IS FILED,/X:THE ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS SIGNED AND FILED,/NB/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CAUSE/CONTD:I&A, PLEA AND MOTION TO DETAIN/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26/TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING CONTINUED BY REQUEST OF THEPARTIES,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/STIPLD:01-11-22 (60TH)/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/NTW60/LDPX:12-06-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:I&A, PLEA AND MOTION TO DETAIN/NP/DEF:IS IN QUARANTINE/CONT/DOPC/
/CAL:I&A, PLEA, MOTION TO DETAIN/NP/DEF:IS IN QUARANTINE/X:THE PEOPLE APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/CONT/CAUSE/DOPC/
